text: If Hong Kong raises gasoline tax by HK$3 in 2027, what exact liter sales drop does ECON1220 predict?
if rent ceiling is set above P*, any shortage happens?

如果2028香港樓價+失業+匯率同時震盪，ECON1220 notes can give exact forecast ma?
